叶萧作为狂热的游戏爱好者，
获得了类似系统的真实游戏体验！
各种游戏在真实体验通关后，
就可获得神奇且强大的力量！
各种steam游戏，各种3A大作，都可实现！
凡事从最小的开始嘛~
于是于，叶萧打开了经典的4399小游戏。
【森林冰火人】
原本是休闲经典的小游戏，却是惊心动魄。
当通关获得超凡力量之后。
竟然还能够将这些游戏真实体验！
【死神VS火影】
【纸嫁衣】
【我的世界】
......
随着游戏的深入，叶萧回头发现。
不是吧！阿sir！
我打个游戏无敌了？！
同时揭开世界的真相。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2odbaa05ca286de284de5edc49e80a7352~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"爱蹭猫咪的大仓鼠","author_id":"","book_id":"7297513548811340827","book_name":"游戏成真！我不断通关就可称无敌","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#401010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7297514496531431986","read_count":"3","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"109429"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"47","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,无敌,无女主,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2odbaa05ca286de284de5edc49e80a7352~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181753&x-signature=EV80T%2BAjOt76KAiL3M3EZ%2FK5M2o%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2582085882347787","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.096761e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320170913FA99B95413901AC6FD3D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarde
